this_title: Willie Macc: Good Dad, Bad Father
introduction: In Good Dad, Bad Father, Willie delivers a brutally honest, funny, and personal performance about becoming a dad before fully becoming an adult. Produced by Super Nice Guys and recorded at the Kukooburra Lounge in Hollywood, Willie humorously unpacks the truth about imperfectly raising kids while continuing to grow in his own life.
chinese_title: Willie Macc: Good Dad, Bad Father
